message:
feat(runtime): implement ACL DRYRUN subcommand

ACL DRYRUN <username> <command> [<arg> ...] tests whether a user has
permission to execute a command without actually running it. Returns
OK if allowed, or an error with the user/command that would be denied.

Handles:
- Full-access users: always returns OK
- Restricted users: checks is_command_authorized() with the test argv
- Non-existent users: returns "ERR User '<name>' not found"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
